cleavage agent: digested in-gel with trypsin as described previously
enrichment method: performed ERα-immunoprecipitation followed by a quantitative mass spectrometry analysis
fractionation method: examined their distributions in polysomes (translationally active ribosome fractions) on sucrose gradient fractionation
fragmentation method: Precursor ions were fragmented by HCD using stepped relative collision energies
instrument: mass spectrometry analysis on a QExactive Plus mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: added to the beads, and incubated overnight at 65°C to reverse crosslink
reduction concentration: added to the beads, and incubated overnight at 65°C to reverse crosslink
